meta.title: Kasi | Ambassadors
meta.description: Originally purchased as a pet at a Texas flea market, Kasi was then surrendered to another rescue facility before being transferred to Alveus.

data.name: Kasi
data.story: Originally purchased as a pet at a Texas flea market, Kasi was then surrendered to another rescue facility before being transferred to Alveus.
data.mission: He is an ambassador for the exotic pet trade and how it affects his species.
